zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannis LeCarter III於1340年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Johannis Le Carter II24歲，母親Agnes Brome20歲。他於1360年與Alicia Bauer在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1393年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johannis LeCarter III was born in 1340, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Johannis Le Carter II, was 24 and his mother, Agnes Brome, was 20. He married Alicia Bauer in 1360, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1393, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Alicia Bauer en 1360, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1393, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannis LeCarter IIIが1340年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Johannis Le Carter IIは24歳，母Agnes Bromeは20歳であった。1360年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlicia Bauerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1393年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johannis LeCarter III(이)가 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johannis Le Carter II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Brome(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1360년 영국 요르크실르에서 Alicia Bauer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannis LeCarter III родился в 1340 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Johannis Le Carter II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Brome, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia Bauer в 1360 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1393 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
